failure_modes.cause: BPR set to 5.0 bar, but required is 889.5 bar
failure_modes.mitigation: Upgrade BPR to handle 900 bar to prevent overpressure

failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 40°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure
Conduct regular inspections and replace PFA tubing as needed

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Test BPR with water at 900 bar to ensure it can maintain pressure without failure
Conduct thermal cycling test on PFA tubing at 120°C for 100 hours to assess degradation
